Module com.cuatrifasico.battleshi
Package com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.shapes

Class SpriteOverlayFactory

java.lang.Object
com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.shapes.SpriteOverlayFactory
public final class SpriteOverlayFactory extends Object
Loads PNG sprites from the classpath and creates ImageView overlays for ships and shot markers. These overlays sit on top of the existing Shape-based nodes, which remain responsible for hit-testing, highlight feedback and CSS-driven state colors.

Sprites are cached on first use so no image is read more than once per JVM run. All PNGs live directly under /images/ on the classpath.

Ship sprite naming convention: <type>_<h|v>.png for the normal state and <type>_sunk_<h|v>.png for the revealed-sunk state, where <type> is derived from the lower-snake-case enum name (e.g. aircraft_carrier, submarine, destroyer, frigate).

Marker sprites: hit.png and miss.png, both 42×42 px.

    private static final String

  • Method Details

    • createShipOverlay

      public static javafx.scene.image.ImageView createShipOverlay(ShipType shipType, Orientation orientation, boolean sunk)
      Creates an ImageView overlay for a ship body sprite. The returned node is sized to exactly match the ship's footprint (size * CELL_SIZE along its length, CELL_SIZE across).
      Parameters:
      shipType - The ship category (determines which sprite file is used).
      orientation - The ship's current orientation.
      sunk - true to use the revealed/sunk variant of the sprite.
      Returns:
      A sized, mouse-transparent ImageView ready to add to the scene.

    • createShipOverlay

      public static javafx.scene.image.ImageView createShipOverlay(ShipType shipType, Orientation orientation)
      Convenience overload for a live (not sunk) ship overlay.
      Parameters:
      shipType - The ship category.
      orientation - The ship's current orientation.
      Returns:
      A sized ImageView for the normal ship sprite.

    • createHitOverlay

      public static javafx.scene.image.ImageView createHitOverlay()
      Creates an ImageView overlay for a hit marker (hit.png). The returned node is CELL_SIZE × CELL_SIZE.
      Returns:
      A sized ImageView for the hit marker sprite.

    • createMissOverlay

      public static javafx.scene.image.ImageView createMissOverlay()
      Creates an ImageView overlay for a miss marker (miss.png). The returned node is CELL_SIZE × CELL_SIZE.
      Returns:
      A sized ImageView for the miss marker sprite.

    • buildShipKey

      private static String buildShipKey(ShipType shipType, Orientation orientation, boolean sunk)
      Builds the cache key for a ship sprite. Format: <snake_type>_[sunk_]<h|v>

    • loadCached

      private static javafx.scene.image.Image loadCached(String key)
      Returns the cached Image for the given key, loading it from the classpath on first access.
      Parameters:
      key - The sprite key (without the .png extension).
      Returns:
      The loaded image.
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - If the sprite file cannot be found on the classpath.

    • buildImageView

      private static javafx.scene.image.ImageView buildImageView(javafx.scene.image.Image image, double width, double height)
      Builds a non-resizable, pixel-perfect ImageView of the given dimensions. Mouse events are disabled so the Shape layer underneath handles all interaction.
      Parameters:
      image - The source image.
      width - Desired display width in scene units.
      height - Desired display height in scene units.
      Returns:
      The configured ImageView.
